name: Domesticated Chick-Pea Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the cooked chick-peas and transfer them to a large bowl.
2. Add the olive oil, lemon juice, and black pepper to the bowl with the chick-peas.
3. Mix well until all ingredients are evenly incorporated.
4. Transfer the mixture to a serving dish and serve chilled or at room temperature.
